essence: Supervises and supports individuals in the community serving sentences or on licence to reduce reoffending.

identity.title: Probation Officer
identity.summary: Assesses risk, develops supervision plans, and works with offenders to address behaviour and reintegration needs.

salary.notes: Specialist roles in high‑risk caseloads attract higher pay.

qualifications: Degree or professional qualification in criminology, social work, or related field
Experience in case management and risk assessment
Ability to manage complex caseloads and multi‑agency work

lifestyle.description: Community‑based role with casework, home visits, and coordination with courts and support services.

habits: Assesses risk and develops supervision plans
Conducts home visits and monitors compliance
Works with partners to provide support and interventions
Prepares reports for courts and parole boards
